JAN: Saki tends to favour two specific P: JAN: Saki tends to favour two specific Pokémon in battle, those being her Metagross and Duraludon.
She's a pretty big fan of Kaiju and Mech: She's a pretty big fan of Kaiju and Mecha-based media series and it reflects pretty hard in the type of Pokémon she prefers.
They're all about taking hits and striki: They're all about taking hits and striking back double, and her signature move works like a well-oiled machine in tandem with those types.
Saki's Super Ultra Mega Death Move (that: Saki's Super Ultra Mega Death Move (that's seriously what it's called), acts very much like the move Shell Side Arm.
Its category changes between Special and: Its category changes between Special and Physical depending on what would be optimal in the moment!  So make sure you're not lacking in either defense.
JAN: Uhhh, good question, give me a mome: JAN: Uhhh, good question, give me a moment.
Saki used to fight on a series of fields: Saki used to fight on a series of fields back when her Gym was in West Gearen, including the Glitch, Factory, Shortcircuit, Murkwater, Colosseum, and Fairy Tale fields.
Given that her family had a hand in deve: Given that her family had a hand in developing the first Field Simulators, I'd suggest being prepared for anything. She likes switching things up on a dime.
That said, she currently has it down as: That said, she currently has it down as Glitch Field on her profile. Annoying one, that.
You can probably make an educated guess: You can probably make an educated guess that whatever field is chosen, it will boost Steel-type attacks in some way!
JAN: The traditional school of thought a: JAN: The traditional school of thought among Steel- type experts is that Defense is everything.
Unlike what you'd expect, Saki follows t: Unlike what you'd expect, Saki follows this, almost a bit too literally! The age old saying of "The Best Offense is a Perfect Defense." is the name of the game with her.
Unless she made a recent change to her t: Unless she made a recent change to her team, anyway. No one knows what she's ever thinking, really.
Despite being one of the best types defe: Despite being one of the best types defensively, a team consisting solely of Steel-types doesn't cover its weaknesses very well.
Using a combination of powerful moves of: Using a combination of powerful moves of different super effective types can leave her without much of a safe switchin.
Fire and Fighting in particular make a r: Fire and Fighting in particular make a really good combination, just make sure you don't get blindsided.
